overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a rocky riverbank at sunset, transitioning through grassy terrain into a wooded valley as dusk settles and the sky displays vibrant purple and orange hues.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline beside the flowing river

entered.detail: flowing river with visible current and white water rapids
steep rock wall with layered stone formations
massive gray rock formation on the riverbank
tall evergreen trees on the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky riverbank with the water flowing on the right and a steep cliff face rising on the left. Large boulders dot the shoreline, and pine trees stand silhouetted against the evening sky in the distance.

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky shoreline to grassy meadow with taller vegetation
sun becomes visible on the horizon creating intense golden-orange backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass along the riverbank toward the setting sun

entered.detail: lush green grass covering the riverbank with wild vegetation
bright orange and pink sunset visible between the hills

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a grassy meadow alongside the river as the sun sets brilliantly on the horizon. The terrain softens from rock to grass, and the golden hour lighting creates long shadows and warm tones across the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding valley trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: path moves away from the river into a narrower valley section with steeper walls

agents.ego_description: following the dirt path as it winds through the valley away from the water

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the valley floor
steep rocky hillside forming the left boundary of the valley

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes a dirt path winding through a valley, moving away from the river which recedes into the distance. Rocky walls rise on both sides, and the vegetation becomes denser as the character proceeds deeper into the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed valley path at dusk with steep rocky sides

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as dusk deepens and the sky darkens to deep purple-blue

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the shadowed valley as natural light fades and surroundings become darker

entered.detail: dense tree cover on the hillside creating dark silhouettes

segments.scene_description: The valley narrows and darkens significantly as dusk settles into evening. The path becomes enclosed by steep rocky cliffs on the left and dense forest on the right, with the sky transitioning from sunset colors to deep purple twilight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverbank that gradually transitions from a bright, open sunset landscape into a dark, enclosed valley at twilight. It begins with the character navigating a narrow rocky shoreline between a flowing river and a steep cliff, with distant pine trees silhouetted against the evening sky. As the path opens into a grassy meadow, the terrain softens and the lighting shifts into warm golden tones with long shadows cast by the setting sun. The scene then shifts as the trail becomes a winding dirt path that leads away from the receding river and deeper into a wilderness of rising rocky walls and denser vegetation. Finally, the valley narrows and darkens as the sky transitions from vibrant sunset colors to a deep purple twilight, leaving the path enclosed by steep cliffs and a thick forest.
